title: Resolve final Rust RPL review findings
description: Resolve final substantive Rust RPL findings covering allowlisted multicast receive, destination-aware DIO/DIS behavior, lichen-ipv6 no_std unit tests, managed prefix route reconciliation, separately persisted explicit DAO admissions, DRX2 scope-bound receive format, and full regression gates.
acceptance_criteria: All child findings are implemented fail-closed without compatibility migration, existing canonical and production tests remain, requested fmt/tests/Clippy/diff gates pass, and no commit is created.
close_reason: All seven final Rust RPL findings completed fail-closed: IPv6 no_std tests, DRX2, separate DAD1 admissions, managed prefix reconciliation, ff02::1a allowlisting, destination-aware DIS timing, and full gates. Canonical/full-path tests remain and no commit was created.
